ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest1037: This strange orb was left behind by the last great Nether invasion of The Overworld.
Legend says, they who wield the &dObsidian Palantir&r gains the power to enter &6The Nether&r unscathed.
Something which has been impossible for hundreds of years...
&eTip:&r Entering The Nether will begin &cExpert Mode.&r If you don't know what that is, check out the chapter &6"Difficulty Modes"
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest1418: There is &oallegedly &ra &o&aWILD party&r over at the Slime Kingdom!
I've gotten you an invitation.. just try to blend in! &rSometimes you just have to invite yourself to parties!
Oh yeah! I remember! The Slime King ate the key!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest1510: &eTip: &rXP earned from trading will teleport to the player!
Note: Using the Trading Post you can trade with all Villagers in the area. Very useful for large villages. It even comes with a helpful search feature!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest1631: 全套木质盔甲所提供的防御力介于皮革套装和锁链套装之间，此外，木制盔甲对弹射物的伤害（如箭）有额外抗性。作为临时盔甲而言，其已足够帮你撑过生存的第一夜。
如何活过第一晚！&e（第一部分：护甲）
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest1873: 已经过去整整一个小时了！想要解锁和进行任务，你必须要签订契约！
&e小窍门：&r建议你签订契约，不然我就只能采取一个……极端手段了……
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest1981: The Brazier can be used to form a special &nmultiblock!&r Some say it can even ward off the undead!
&eTip:&r You can create more Living Torches by clicking the &eBrazier&r with a regular torch! The Living Torch can be used to see the radius a Brazier covers! It will be useful later.
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest2160: Upon walking into a village with the &c&lBad Omen&r effect
You will start a modded raid!
Walk into a Village with the "&oBad Omen" Status Effect
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest2255: The Theater is a naturally generating structure you can find in the roofed forest biome. The audience in the theater can be made up of Pillagers, Vindicators, the occasional Witch, and if you’re lucky, an Illusioner might come to watch.
&oCome one, come all! Enjoy the show!! Unless you are a Villager, then why not become my next "stage assistant" -Conjurer
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest2256: &6Hint:&r The Turtle Armor gives its wearer increased speed in water and projectile protection at the cost of slowness on land!
&oCraft a set of Turtle Armor and feel the mighty power of the Turtle!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest2370: &oHave you ever wanted to display your most proud achievements?
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest2419: &e工具箱&r可存储&d8&r种不同的物品。实际上，它就是一个额外的快捷栏！
Upon placing the inventory can be opened by &dRight-Clicking&r.
Upon breaking &eThe Toolbox&r will retain its inventory!
&6Hint:&r &eThe Toolbox&r is very helpful for storing bonus tools such as Pickaxes!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest2435: 对于探索而言，小地图（世界地图）的重要性不言而喻。
&e按下M键&r可以打开&6世界地图&r，而&6小地图&r就在屏幕的&e右上角&r。借助他们，你就能纵览世界的全貌，此外它们还会自动记录你已经去过的地方。
死亡之后，在你死亡的地方会自动生成一个&d路径点&r。当然你也可以在&6世界地图&r中创建&d路径点&r。
&e小窍门：&r当你移动到你最近一次死亡的路径点附近时，这个路径点会被自动删除。
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest2580: As a Dwarf, you have a certain affinity for mining and digging..
&eI'M A DWARF AND I'M DIGGING A HOLE.. DIGGY DIGGY HOLE I'M DIGGING A HOLE! &r&7You sing to yourself... This song was huge with the Dwarven youth.. about 10 years ago.. gosh you feel old..
&eTip:&r Dwarves are much slower to Combat Roll, they are simply quite clumsy!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest2632: It is of &n&outmost importance&r to claim the chunks where you occupy a residence. Claimed chunks disallow mobs and players from griefing inside your land.
Only members&r currently in your team are allowed to break and interact with blocks.
Simply hold &dRight-Click&r and drag across the grid to claim chunks!
Claim chunks from inside your &dXaeros World Map&r, press &dM&r to access this menu!
&6Hint:&r You can use /sethome and /home to teleport back!
&eTip:&r Use /openpac-parties to add friends as a team member or ally!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest2673: &e剪贴板&r可用于轻松记下待办事项！
因此，其值得尽早制作出来！
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest2746: Over the next &eMinecraft Day&r you will begin to unlock your &lVAMPIRIC POWER!&r BUT! You will need to change your diet.... ;)
&e&lTip:&r Hold the ' &6&l-&r ' Key to suck an animals blood!
&6&lHint:&r As a Pureblood, you will start as a Level 2 Vampire!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest2772: &oVillage Sign-Posts can be found within a few hundred blocks of a Village. These will guide you in the general direction of a Village.
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest2804: &o有时你会在村庄中发现悬赏板。在这里你可以接受并完成悬赏来获取与悬赏难度所匹配的奖励。
&6提示：&r每份悬赏都有完成的时间限制！时间耗尽后，悬赏就无法完成了！
随着时间的推移，悬赏板中将会不断出现新的悬赏！
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest2841: Why did you milk that creeper? What possessed you to do that?
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest2847: 按下&d（R）&r键来进行翻滚！你不能在半空中或水中使用翻滚！一次时机恰当的翻滚可能决定着战斗的生与死！
你有&e（1）&r次&d战术翻滚的充能&r，在使用后其会重新冷却。
&6小窍门：&r解锁&e专家模式&r和&e大师模式&r，你可以获得更多的&d战术翻滚充能&r。
&7战术翻滚充能条就在你快捷栏的右侧！
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest2929: The Goblin Trader is a curious little fellow, they sometimes approach Players in caves or underground! They offer all sorts of trades! These trades change each time you find them!
&eBe approached by a Goblin Trader &o(what an honor)
&eBe approached by a Goblin Trader &o(what an honor)
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest2948: The &6Sophisticated Backpack&r offers impressive portable storage space, making it an invaluable addition to your adventuring toolkit!
&dFun fact!&r You can upgrade your backpack with special upgrades! Type &e@backpack&r into JEI to view the options!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest2996: The Iron Paraglider (and all other upgraded Paragliders) boost your durability greatly!
&eTip:&r Paragliders can also be enchanted with &dUnbreaking&r or &dMending!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest3108: 使用&e三明治站&r中，你可以做出独特的模块化三明治！
可制作三明治的种类几乎是无限的！首先放下三明治站，在三明治站上面放上一片面包片。
放上去的必须是&e面包片&r！之后你就可以尽情放上你想要放的馅料了。最后在三明治的最上面再放上一片面包片来为你的三明治收尾。然后破坏掉这个三明治，其就会以物品形式掉落，你的三明治制作完成了！
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest3326: 自然指南针能帮你定位到你想去的自然群系！
只需右击然后点击开始搜索！别忘了确认你所寻找的生物群系就在你所处的维度之中！
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest3356: If you want to ensure you arrive on time, you'll likely want to invest in a &eCopper Upgrade&r
This item can be combined with your glider of choice in an anvil to protect it during bad weather!
Attempting to glide during thunder will result in your glider being set on fire!
So if you want to protect yourself from Zeus himself, craft in a Copper Upgrade!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest3437: &e自动合成器&r可作为一种基础的自动化合成方式。在选择配方并提供所需材料后，当接收到红石信号（如按钮或拉杆产生的信号）时，&e合成自动机&r就会开始进行合成。
&7&o“如果自动合成器能合成自动合成器，那自动合成器能合成多少次？”-QM
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest3513: Hmmm.. where is The Tower Guardian gone?
It seems we can insert a &eSoul Star&r into each &eStone Altar&r... Perhaps that will summon him..
&6Hint:&r After activating each &eStone Altar&r a boss fight will begin, come prepared!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest3604: 想要点燃营火，需要用&e打火石&r对着一个未点燃的营火&6右击&r。
营火会为其附近小范围内的玩家提供&d舒适&r效果，此效果会使回血的速度加快。
在点燃的篝火附近的一小片范围内怪物也将无法生成。
如何活过第一晚！&e（第二部分：营火）
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest3689: 死亡之后，你会收到一把&e坟墓钥匙&r。钥匙会指引着你回到你上一次死亡的位置，同时那里会生成一座&e墓碑&r，装着你的遗物。
死亡之后，你将会变成一具&b灵体&r！在buff效果消散之前（持续30s）或你与世界交互之前，你是隐形的。
&6提示：&r你可以将坟墓钥匙与特定的物品合成（如&e末影之眼&r）来制作&e附魔的坟墓钥匙&r，其可以将你带到你的墓碑所在的位置，只需&e点击右键使用。
&7墓园小窍门：&r你的坟墓会受到庇护，但只会持续六十分钟，在那之后，任何人（&o或者事物&r&o◉‿◉）&r都可以打开你的坟墓！
死亡之后会获得一把&e坟墓钥匙
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest3736: Befriend a creature to complete this quest!
<rainb>Bonus<rainb> <rainb>Objective:<rainb> &rTame the cutest creature you can find!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest4073: &6Hint:&r The Obsidian Palantir drops from a special event called the &eEternal Invasion Gateway!&r
&eTip:&r This "Eternal Invasion Gateway" appears to be craftable... With just the right ingredients we can open a rift and defeat whoever has the Palantir! Lets force them to come to us!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest4146: &6Hint:&r Be careful when committing crimes in villages! Stealing, breaking blocks and attacking villagers will alert the nearby villager guards if a witness spots you!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest4163: 饰品可以通过探索、制造或者交易的方式获得。
打开你的物品栏，点击盔甲栏附近的饰品按钮，就可以打开佩戴饰品的界面了。有非常多种饰品可供你收集，它们中的每一个都具有独特、强大的特性，也有一些很&o古怪&r。
&e小窍门：&r有些饰品需要按指定的键位才能激活功能，按下SHIFT键就能查看所绑定的键位是哪一个了。此外，还有一些饰品只是为你提供数值加成。
&6提示：&r死亡的时候，已装备的饰品仍会保留在饰品栏中，不会因死亡而掉落。
&o饰品是指一些可以装备的小玩意儿。去帮我杀几只邪恶的怪物，我就送你一个免费的饰品。
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest4175: 好了……已经过去两个小时了……你&c必须&r得在这该死的东西上签字……
你到底需要灵魂做什么？给我，我会让它发挥出&c更好&r的作用。
好吗？让我最后再说一次，&c&l&n签字！
&4<shake>签下这份该死的契约！不然就等着我的律师函吧！
说真的……你为什么不直接来签契约呢？我也只是想完成我的工作……你&o不想我失去工作，对吧？你要让我再枯等一个小时吗？？
&d在&o&n非常&r&d糟糕的事情发生之前，再提醒你最后一次。
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest4238: &6提示：&r你可以在沙漠群系中找到响尾蛇！
&7&o你知道吗？沙锤里面装的其实是豆子 :)
合成一个&e沙锤&d（隐藏任务）
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest4302: &6Hint:&r Give a Heartstone to a friend and track them with your other Heartstone
Craft a &eHeartstone&r and never lose track of your friends again!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest4335: &6提示：&r可以在海洋群系找到塞壬！
&6提示：&r可以在地下找到食人妖！
&6提示：&r可以在村庄袭击中找到劫掠兽！
&o你还想杀点啥？很好！去工作吧！坦率的说，这个饰品可不是免费的。
&e我很好奇这些饰品！第三部分
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest4513: &cWarning:&r By completing this quest you are accepting an item that will begin an optional challenge, &ncontinue at your own peril!
&cWarning:&r Upon equipping this item, you will not be able to take it off! This ring is bound to your soul!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest4522: Visit a Swamp Biome and Kill 3x &eStymphalian Birds
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest4591: &c&l我诅咒你！我诅咒你！我诅咒你！去死吧！
&e提示：&r每过一小时你就会受到诅咒，直到你签下契约！
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest4716: &6桶中的美西螈：&7感谢你下载这个整合包！我们希望你能喜欢永恒的MC的全新版本！
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest4740: &6Hint:&r The Quest Shop is located on the far right of the screen, you can identify it by the coin icon!
&eTip:&r You can find this item for sale at &e&n"The Tavern"
Open &eThe Quest Shop&r and purchase a &eSpecialty Craft Beer&r.. I'm thirsty!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest4854: 工作站是升级版的工作台！
&6小窍门：&r即便你关掉工作站的界面，放在左侧合成格中的物品仍会保留在其中。
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest4971: 嗨！我是&6巴里&r！我是你肩上的小老鼠，在你需要的时候为你提供帮助！我某种意义上……是个吉祥物！
总的来说，我是你的新朋友，也是最好的朋友，我会为你做任何事！
&6巴里！我的老天鹅！:O&r&7（点此完成任务）
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest5075: &e&o“如果我是在工作后得到的这些饰品，那它们真的算是免费的吗？你思考到。”
&6提示：&r可以在沙漠群系找到沙风怪
&6提示：&r可以在沼泽群系找到女巫
&6提示：&r可以在悬崖群系找到娜迦
&o再杀几只邪恶的怪物，就能获得另一件免费的饰品啦！
我很好奇这些饰品！第二部分
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest5092: &dJEI的快捷功能：&r按下&e“U”&r来查看物品的用途，按下&e“R”&r来查看物品的配方！
&e小窍门：&r当开始游玩一个新整合包时，尤其是像永恒的MC这样又庞大又复杂的整合包，感觉不知所措是非常正常的。我建议你慢慢来，按照自己的节奏慢慢浏览任务书的内容。
你可以按照原版MC的方式游玩发展，然后在游玩过程中缓慢了解认识新的机制，这样的话你应该就不太会因为选择太多而感到不知所措了。
不过最重要的是：以你喜欢的方式去游玩这个整合包，以及不要对一周目的选择抱有太多的担忧。
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest5154: 砍树变得更加简单了！反复破坏同一块原木，你就可以砍倒整棵树木。把树完全砍倒后，其会倒下，然后产出所有的掉落物。
如此砍树所消耗的时间与原版的砍树方式一样，只不过全程你只需要反复破坏同一个原木方块——而这大大提高生活质量。你也可以按住&dShift&r来如原版一般破坏原木方块。
&e小窍门：&r记得从最下面的原木方块开始挖！
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest5215: &eTip:&r The Boombox can be used to play records while moving! &oHuge in Goblin circles right now.
&oTrade with a Goblin Trader for a Boombox!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest5466: &r&8(Complete all non-optional Quests in The Introduction Chapter)
&oComplete the "A New Start" chapter to unlock special treasure!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest5629: It seems the tower is locked to prevent interlopers and ne'er-do-wells from entering!
Now I wonder where the key might be?
&lHEY!&r &owait a second! &rI think I remember a certain slimey member of the slime royal family having a key that resembles that lock...
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest5762: &e怪奇宝典&r十分有用，其可以储存来自其他模组的指导书。
将怪奇宝典与一本指导书一起合成，指导书就会存进怪奇宝典里。
只需手持怪奇宝典&d右击&r，然后选择想要的指导书，其就会变成你所指定的指导书。之后只需手持变化过的怪奇宝典（指导书）&d左击&r即可将其变回怪奇宝典。
你也可以通过&d蹲下并丢出&r怪奇宝典的方式来移除已添加的指导书。（需先通过上述步骤将其变化为指导书）
我已经将一些指导书存进怪奇宝典里，可以帮你更快的上手！只需享受！
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest5818: &eTip:&r Each level of the tower expands the range of effect by 10 blocks, with a maximum height of 10.
Build the mighty Brazier tower and stop monsters from spawning nearby!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest5854: The Mimic can be found rarely underground and in Dungeons.
It's deceptive nature might fool unsuspecting adventurers but you've got me to guide you! &oHurrah!
&6Hint:&r The Mimic hides under the guise as a regular chest. You can easily find a Mimic by looking for it's main tell.. &eGreen Particles&r as it always will spawn as a &dChampion Mob.
&eTip:&r Upon killing a Mimic, they will drop a &7"Curios Cache"&r
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest5877: I was getting frustrated watching you run around on foot!
So I crafted you an &l&oAWESOME&r gift!
The &dWaystone&r is a special block you can place that allows you to teleport to other Waystones at the cost of &dXP
Waystones can be created &oeventually&r, but they are quite expensive and &l&oVERY&r much out of &l&oYOUR&r reach!
&eTip:&r You can find Waystones by exploring! Upon interacting with one you can teleport to and from it!
The process is a &otad expensive&r on the experience side, so I suggest using them sparingly!
I would encourage you to create some sort of other means of transport for frequent use!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest5917: The Trash Compactor can be used to generate bottles of experience for waste materials!
The Trash Compactor requires a fuel source, like coal and a waste material, like Cobblestone.
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest6051: Collar Tags can be used to rename your pets cheapily!
They can also be used to enchant your pets with neat enchantments!
Simply combine a pet enchanted book with a Collar Tag in an Anvil!
Or enchant it in an Enchanting Table!
There are dozens of pet enchants out there, each with different ways to customize your pets!
&6Hint:&r Right-Click the Collar Tag on your pet and hold shift to view their currently equipped tag!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest6091: The &eEnchantment Library&r can be used to store excess &dEnchanted Books&r.
Inserting a book into the top slot will store every enchantment on that book in the library. Enchantments themselves are stored as "Points"
To remove an enchantment from the library, simply click on that enchantment's tile.
If the output is empty, it will generate a new enchanted book with that enchantment on it (starting at level 1).
Subsequent clicks will increase the level on the output book. Shift-Clicking will attempt to extract the max level available to the output book.
&6Hint:&r It can accept input from &eHoppers&r and others!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest6201: The Illager King has ordered a large indefinite bounty for slaying dragons and claiming their heads as a trophy, they have been pillaging and destroying his settlements for far too long!
If you can slay one of these monstrous beasts you will be handsomely rewarded!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest6208: The Sea Serpent is one of the most dangerous foes in the oceans diverse eco-system.
It has no natural predators and is considered an apex predator! Come prepared!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest6380: &oIf you feed a Dolphin raw cod or salmon, the Dolphin can lead you to the nearest Shipwreck!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest6490: 动态光源已实装！哇哦！试着把光源拿在手里！
&e小窍门：&r你可以把火把或者灯笼拿在副手上来照亮附近！
&6提示：&r你可以将灯笼挂在方块的侧面，以将其挂在墙上。
如何活过第一晚！&e（第三部分：照明）
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest6719: The &dPortable Pet Sphere&r is a very useful utility item for storing pets!
You can contain any tamed pet inside the sphere and release them whenever you wish!
Wait a second.. this isn't Cobblemon Eternal!
I'm gonna catch some of them! (Don't sue me Nintendo)
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest6889: &e饰品盒子&r可以用于储存多种饰品！并且可以快速切换饰品，是一件非常&o便利&r的工具，值得制造。
&d现在你能轻松保存这些奇珍异宝了！
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest6908: &e小窍门：请不要破坏这些战利品箱子，其他玩家仍能从你已打开过的战利品箱子中获取宝藏。不过如果你是单人游玩，就不必在意了。
&o在永恒的MC2中，宝藏都会生成在每个玩家的战利品箱子中。每个发现战利品箱子的玩家都能从中随机获取宝藏。
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest6920: &d§7Hello lovely! I have packed you some lunch to help with your Questing! - Mom
I have also found some items that might be useful for you while I was at the market! Some sort of &e"Unique Item"&r&d §7or something... I figured you would know what to do with it! XOXO
&d§7PS, I saw this beautiful painting on display, I think it was called "Bold and Brash", would you like me to pick it up for you? I think it would look great in your bedroom!
Mom has sent you mail! &n§aYou should open it!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest7075: The &eNo Soliciting Sign&r will prevent &dWandering Traders&r from appearing within 10 Chunks of the sign!
&7Begone! Your goods are not wanted here!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest7111: The Illager King has ordered a large indefinite bounty for slaying dragons and claiming their heads as a trophy, they have been pillaging and destroying his settlements for far too long!
If you can slay one of these monstrous beasts you will be handsomely rewarded!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest7151: &eTip:&r You need to activate the rift before you can use it, interact to activate it!
&oAfter defeating a boss, a Boss Rift will appear. By interacting with a rift you can warp home free of charge!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest7178: &8开发者日志：MCE2中有大量的任务，分布于多个章节，很容易让人不知所措。试着把注意力放在入门指南的任务线来开始游戏吧！
你有新邮件！&o我很好奇是谁寄的。
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest7196: 你可以自由的选择是否完成&3任务书&r中的任务&o（但是推荐你这样做）&r，制定任务线的目的是为玩家提供引导，奇技淫巧，独特的奖励以及回报丰厚的挑战。
§a✔&r 你&l可以&r按照自己的节奏游玩，并获得独特的奖励。
§a✔&r 你&l可以&r在详尽的任务线中深入的学习实践模组的内容。（还有更多的任务线在持续不断的制作中）
§a✔&r 你&l可以&r通过完成任务，获取特殊的头衔。
&a✔&r 你&l可以&r获取任务硬币，用这些硬币在硬币商店买些东西。&o（即将推出™）
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest7429: The &eParaglider&r can be used to safely travel in the sky!

While not the fastest way to travel, gliders are a very useful item that should be part of your toolkit! They allow you to quickly save yourself from fall damage while also granting you a new form of movement!
Jumping off cliffs or into deep ravines? Gliders got you covered!
Simply equip in your &dGlider Curio Slot&r and upon pressing spacebar mid-air you will activate your glider!
&6Hint:&r Try flying your glider in third person! It is far easier to control and looks awesome!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest7638: 你可以在&e团队GUI&r界面中创建一个队伍，打开物品栏，点击你屏幕&e左上角&r的一个叫做“我的队伍”的按钮就可以打开那个界面了。
处在同一个队伍中的玩家会共享任务的进度！务必只邀请那些你相信的人进入你的队伍。
&a&l来自任务大师的提示：&r有时候，与其他人处在同一个队伍中游玩会令人摸不着头脑，因此在推进任务时，建议团队的成员多多沟通合作。不然的话……你可能没办法按预期体验游戏内容。
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest7776: 你可以召唤&e行李箱&r伙伴！
召唤出来的&e行李箱&r伙伴会自动捡起掉落在地上的东西……以及你的芳心！&d♡
不过最重要的是，&e行李箱&r伙伴相当于一个便携式的箱子，会随你走遍世界的每个角落！
&6提示：&r行李箱被闪电击中后，会获得&7&o超进化&r！
&e小窍门：&r你可以按下&dShift+右键&r来收回你的行李箱伙伴。
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest7836: It is time. We need to enter The Nether!
The Nether is full of valuble resources, multiple Legendary Eyes among other valuble treasures to claim!
&6Hint:&r Use the Flint and Steel on the portal frame!
&4Note:&r Entering The Nether will start EXPERT MODE!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest7866: 利用&e便携式项目工作台&r，不需要停下就可以合成物品！只需简单地&e右击&r就可以打开&e合成界面！
制作一个&e便携式橡木工作台
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest8047: You sure do love lootin' chests huh!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest8202: It seems we need a mysterious object called the &6Obsidian Palantir!&r
This object &oshould&r grant us passage into The Nether! You might need to &o"handle"&r whoever is currently in possession of this artifact!
Huh... I guess things have changed...
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest8323: The Wise Oak has seen just about everything there is to see..
Legend says that these ancient trees have existed since the world was first created!
Perhaps it might share some of its wisdom with you..
&6Hint:&r Wise Oak also uh.. has a very high Enchanting Power. It makes nearby Enchanting Tables produce stronger enchants... Something tells me they won't like that very much however.
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest8362: &7想要开启这段&l&d<rainb>新颖&r<rainb>&7而&d&l<rainb>令人激动<rainb>&r&7的冒险™吗？那就签下这份契约吧，签下之后，基本就意味着&l“你”&r所创造的一切都归属于我，&7以及&l你的灵魂&r&7……
&r&7（一堆没用的废话）……想要解锁任务，&7不管是谁……（一堆没用的废话）……都必须签订契约！&c&l现在立刻马上！
&7*警告，如果没有在&l&c一小时内&r&7签订契约，我的律师可就要登门拜访了。*
&7&o后续的字迹变得奇小无比，难以阅读*
&7&o在虚线处签名……这里……这里……这里……还有这儿……
&e解锁头衔：&r上当受骗的人&7&o（按“=”键装备）
&7一份&o“契约”&r出现在你面前，仿若刚出炉于&l地狱深渊！
&4血之契约&7（扣减血量以签订契约）
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest8363: The Calender allows you to see more information about the season you are currently in!
The World will go through the four seasons ->
Each season affects the world in different ways such as the speed of crop growth!
Some crops are season specific so keep an eye on that!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest8370: The Pet Bed when bound to a pet allows them to respawn upon dying!
They will be found sleeping peacefully in their bed the following morning!
&6Hint:&r Push a pet onto a Pet Bed to link them, you can tell if they are linked by the &7Zzz&r particles that begin appearing!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest8416: Hello! You are a normal human!
That is all there is to it! Here! have an apple!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest8424: &7嘘...先试着把尽可能多的&e蟑螂&r&7聚在一起，再把&e沙锤&r给其中一只
把&e沙锤&r给一只&e蟑螂&d（隐藏任务）
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest8465: Consider joining our Discord for support! We have a very active friendly community of over 30k users that would be happy to answer any questions you might have!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest8697: &6Hint:&r&e The Living Flame&r is a very rare item that can be found in a Jungle Temple, or by killing a Crazed Illager in a Mansion!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest8785: &d"The Wandering Thief"&r is an Ex Villager gone rogue. They approach their victims under the guise of a legitimate Wandering Trader, and when you least expect it... BAM! They strike! and take all of your precious items. They are wanted for the robbery of over two dozen innocent Villagers and Adventurers.
&7&o"I make ends meet.. Just like any man.. I work with my hands... If you cross my path.. I'll knock you out.. Drag you off the road.. Steal yo' shoes from off yo' feet..."
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest8802: &oUncover the remains of a Wrecked Ship
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest8928: The Feather on a Stick can be used to play with your pets!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest8989: These magnificent creatures can be tamed and make for a perfect aquatic companion! They have a very fast underwater speed and can be mounted by the player if tamed.
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest9079: As an orc you have increased armor and health!
But animals seem to be afraid of you for some reason?
&c&lLOOKS LIKE MEATS BACK ON THE MENU BOYS! &r&7&oor not.. maybe you are a vegetarian orc, they exist!
&eTip:&r Orcs are much slower to Combat Roll, they are simply quite clumsy!
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.quest9310: The &eCage&r can be used to capture small mobs! Very useful tool for transporting small animals!
&d&oDespite all my rage I am still just a small animal in a cage ♫
ftbquests.chapter.introduction.title: &7崭新的开始！&f<neon p=8 r=2 a=0.15>（推荐！）
